label: prelim-4814: approval-vote proxy for contestant Top 30%

rationale.blend: Prelim contestant voting is approval-ballot ranking, not final 词/曲/调 scoring. Salience matters because each team distributes roughly half its field worth of picks, but each work still needs strong backing once heard. Use 45% raw support / 55% conversion.
rationale.views: Raised to 18% for ballot salience (contestants must hear a work to approve it). Still below leaked Bilibili play coef influence because we min-max normalize counts.
rationale.favoritesAndCoins: Closest public proxies for costly approval intent; favorite 20%, coin 18%.
rationale.replies: Comments proxy discussion depth; 14% support / 16% conversion. Strong signal in S3 data (avg 2.9% reply rate vs 0.056% danmaku).
rationale.shares: Raised toward leaked Bilibili share weight (0.6 coef); 14% support / 12% conversion.
rationale.danmaku: Cut to 6% support / 6% conversion. Leaked Bilibili weights danmaku ~14.5%, but 84% of S3 entries have zero danmaku (median 0, max 4).
rationale.sanlian: Keep locked partial-sanlian adjusted like/coin/favorite fields; weight favorite > coin > like.

outputNotes.html: Frozen table report — not overwritten by the ranking script unless you pass --html explicitly.
outputNotes.htmlVisual: Default visual/dashboard report written on each script run.
outputNotes.htmlPlayground: Interactive weight playground — separate script; does not overwrite other HTML outputs.
